name: Glorious Sun Enterprises Limited
summary: Glorious Sun Enterprises Limited, an investment holding company, engages in interior decoration and renovation business, and retail and export of casual wear in Mainland China, Hong Kong, Australia, New Zealand, Canada, the United States, and internationally. It operates through four segments: Interior Decoration and Renovation; Retail, Franchise and Others; Export Operations; and Financial Investments. The Interior Decoration and Renovation segment engages in the interior decoration and renovation businesses, as well as sale of furniture. The Retail, Franchise and Others segment engages in the retail operation in Hong Kong, as well as franchise sale activities under the Jeanswest brand in casual wear and apparel domain. The Export Operations segment exports apparel. The Financial Investments segment is involved in the treasury management and consulting business. The company also offers garment design and agency services. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 10 Jeanswest branded stores in Hong Kong. Glorious Sun Enterprises Limited was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
